triples.object: Biodegradable polymers are polymers that can be decomposed by the action of living organisms. [ 1 ] Whereas most polymers are designed for longevity, biodegradable polymers are not. [ 2 ] Biodegradable polymers can be derived from renewable raw materials, petrochemicals , or combinations thereof. [
